---
title: Creating and Sharing Code for Reproducible Research and Scalable Impact
date: 2022-01-21 10:00:00+00:00
author:
  - "Robin Lovelace"
---
## Creating and Sharing Code for Reproducible Research and Scalable Impact

**Event:** Code sharing workshop

**Date:** 2022-01-21 10:00:00+00:00

Invited talk to Policy Fellows on how code sharing can increase impact
